question: How many papers report both a highlighted research question and a highlighted research question answer?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P37330 ?rq .
  ?rq orkgp:P55039 ?rq_highlight .
  ?contribution orkgp:P57004 ?rqa .
  ?rqa orkgp:P55039 ?rqa_highlight .
}

question: Which machine learning algorithms are reported in papers that also report both precision and recall?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?algo ?algoLabel
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
  ?da orkgp:P57016 ?ml .
  ?ml orkgp:P2001 ?algo .
  ?algo rdfs:label ?algoLabel .
  ?ml orkgp:P2006 ?metric .
  ?metric orkgp:P5073 ?recall .
  ?metric orkgp:P3004 ?precision .
}

question: What are the reported data collection method names in papers whose collected data are classified as qualitative?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?methodName
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:DATA ?research_data .
  ?research_data orkgp:P7055 ?data_type .
  ?data_type orkgp:P57038 ?qualitative .
  ?qualitative rdfs:label ?qualitativeLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?qualitativeLabel)) = LCASE("qualitative"))
  ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method .
  ?method orkgp:P145012 ?methodNameRes .
  ?methodNameRes rdfs:label ?methodName .
}

question: Which papers report at least two different measures of central tendency and also at least one measure of dispersion or variation?
Which papers report both null-hypothesis and alternative-hypothesis statements under inferential statistics?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
  ?da orkgp:P56043 ?inf .
  ?inf orkgp:P30001 ?hypNull .
  ?hypNull orkgp:P41703 ?nullType .
  ?nullType orkgp:P35106 ?nullHypothesis .
  ?inf orkgp:P30001 ?hypAlt .
  ?hypAlt orkgp:P41703 ?altType .
  ?altType orkgp:P35107 ?altHypothesis .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel }
}

question: Which papers mention threats to validity but do not classify any of them as construct, internal, external, conclusion, reliability, generalizability, repeatability, content, descriptive, or theoretical validity?
Which papers published after 2018 report quantitative data, at least one machine-learning metric, and no descriptive statistics?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?year) > 2018)
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:DATA ?research_data .
  ?research_data orkgp:P7055 ?data_type .
  ?data_type orkgp:P57039 ?quantitative .
  ?quantitative rdfs:label ?quantitativeLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?quantitativeLabel)) = LCASE("quantitative"))
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
  ?da orkgp:P57016 ?ml .
  ?ml orkgp:P2006 ?metric .
  FILTER EXISTS { ?metric orkgp:P5073 ?recall . }
  FILTER EXISTS { ?metric orkgp:P3004 ?precision . }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?da orkgp:P56048 ?ds . }
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel }
}

question: Which papers report a highlighted research question and at least one highlighted subquestion with a question type?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P37330 ?rq .
  ?rq orkgp:P55039 ?rqHighlight .
  ?rq orkgp:P57000 ?subq .
  ?subq orkgp:P55039 ?subqHighlight .
  ?subq orkgp:P41928 ?subqType .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel }
}

question: Which papers have a data collection method where both the method type and method name are reported, and also have a venue label?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method .
  ?method orkgp:P94003 ?methodType .
  ?method orkgp:P145012 ?methodName .
  ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue .
  ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_name .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel }
}

question: Which papers report the largest number of distinct descriptive-statistic categories among frequency, central tendency, dispersion, and position?
